patch.value: Add an 'ops metrics' command that renders pm workspace health as Prometheus text-format gauges so the existing Prometheus/Grafana stack can scrape fleet project-management signals. Per-repo series: pm_items{status}, pm_active_items_by_type, pm_active_items_by_priority, pm_blocked_items (via pm list-blocked), pm_stale_items (--stale-days, default 14), pm_throughput_items{window=7d|30d}, pm_cycle_time_seconds{quantile} and pm_backlog_age_seconds{quantile} derived from created_at/closed_at (same closed_at methodology as pm-brief momentum), pm_workspace_available, pm_repos_scanned, pm_scrape_duration_seconds. Default output is Prometheus exposition; --output writes a node_exporter textfile; --json/--format json exposes the structured routing contract. Reframe of companion feature pm-cli-website-e8ty (enrich existing pm-ops over a standalone pm-metrics package).
Add 'ops metrics' Prometheus exporter for pm workspace health

ops metrics emits valid Prometheus exposition (HELP/TYPE per family, no NaN); Counts, throughput, cycle-time and backlog-age computed from real pm items; Honors global --json for the fleet routing contract (payload.repos[].path); Missing pm workspace marked unavailable without failing

value.author: claude-opus
value.text: CI-green fixes (2026-07-14, PR #12): (1) global --json now honored via ctx.global.json — the installed CLI consumes --json into ctx.global not ctx.options, so metrics (which returns a pre-rendered Prometheus string by default) explicitly reads ctx.global; fixes the fleet routing-contract test that JSON.parsed '# HELP' text. (2) restoreCliRepoFlag now restores the FULL repeated --repos set: CLI 2026.7.14 collapses repeated flags to last-wins (not just #550 full-erasure), so the empty-only guard dropped earlier values; argv is now authoritative for CLI invocations. (3) dropped removed --isolated flag from the installed-CLI doctor test (2026.7.14 dropped it). All 41 tests pass locally.
